proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { Set.new[T0](ideal_product_generators_contains[T0](x0, x1)) = ideal_product_generators[T0](x0, x1) }[R](i, j)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[R](ideal_product_generators_contains[R](i, j), x)

goal: ideal_product_generators_contains(i, j, x) = exists(k0: R, k1: R) { i.contains(k0) and j.contains(k1) and x = k0 * k1 }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0], x2: T0) { exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and k1 ∈ x1 and k0 * k1 = x2 } = ideal_product_generators_contains[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, j, x)

goal: exists(k0: R, k1: R) { i.contains(k0) and j.contains(k1) and a * b = k0 * k1 }

proof: let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { w0 ∈ i and k0 ∈ j and w0 * k0 = a * b } }
let w1: R satisfy { w0 ∈ i and w1 ∈ j and a * b = w0 * w1 }
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0], x2: T0) { exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and k1 ∈ x1 and k0 * k1 = x2 } = ideal_product_generators_contains[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, j, a * b)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { Ideal.closure[T0](ideal_product_generators[T0](x0, x1)) = ideal_product[T0](x0, x1) }[R](i, j)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { Ideal.closure[T0](ideal_product_generators[T0](x0, x1)) = ideal_product[T0](x0, x1) }[R](i, j)

goal: exists(k0: R, k1: R) { i.contains(k0) and j.contains(k1) and x = k0 * k1 }

proof: function(x0: R, x1: R) { not x0 ∈ j or not x1 ∈ i or x1 * x0 ∈ c }(b, a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Set[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = set_subset_ideal[T0](x0, x1) }[R](ideal_product_generators[R](i, j), c)
let w0: R satisfy { w0 ∈ ideal_product_generators[R](i, j) and not w0 ∈ c }
function(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ ideal_product_generators[R](i, j) or x0 ∈ c }(w0)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { Ideal.closure[T0](ideal_product_generators[T0](x0, x1)) = ideal_product[T0](x0, x1) }[R](i, j)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { w0 ∈ i and k0 ∈ j and not w0 * k0 ∈ c } }
let w1: R satisfy { w0 ∈ i and w1 ∈ j and not w0 * w1 ∈ c }
let w2: R satisfy { w0 ∈ i and w2 ∈ j and not w0 * w2 ∈ c }
function(x0: R, x1: R) { not x0 ∈ j or not x1 ∈ i or x1 * x0 ∈ c }(w2, w0)

goal: bundled_ideal_subset[R](ideal_product[R](i, j), c) = forall(x0: R) { ideal_product[R](i, j).contains(x0) implies c.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = bundled_ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](ideal_product[R](i, j), c)
(forall(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ ideal_product[R](i, j) or x0 ∈ c } = true)
function(x0: R) { not (x0 ∈ ideal_product[R](i, j) and not x0 ∈ c) }(a * b)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { w0 ∈ i and k0 ∈ j and not w0 * k0 ∈ c } }
let w1: R satisfy { w0 ∈ i and w1 ∈ j and not w0 * w1 ∈ c }
let w2: R satisfy { w0 ∈ i and w2 ∈ j and not w0 * w2 ∈ c }
function(x0: R, x1: R) { not x0 ∈ j or not x1 ∈ i or x1 * x0 ∈ c }(w2, w0)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { w0 ∈ i and k0 ∈ j and not w0 * k0 ∈ i ∩ j } }
let w1: R satisfy { w0 ∈ i and w1 ∈ j and not w0 * w1 ∈ i ∩ j }
let w2: R satisfy { w0 ∈ i and w2 ∈ j and not w0 * w2 ∈ i ∩ j }
function(x0: R, x1: R) { not x0 ∈ j or not x1 ∈ i or x1 * x0 ∈ i ∩ j }(w2, w0)

goal: bundled_ideal_subset[R](ideal_product[R](i, j), i) = forall(x0: R) { ideal_product[R](i, j).contains(x0) implies i.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = bundled_ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](ideal_product[R](i, j), i)
(forall(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ ideal_product[R](i, j) or x0 ∈ i } = true)
function(x0: R) { not (x0 ∈ ideal_product[R](i, j) and not x0 ∈ i) }(x)

goal: bundled_ideal_subset[R](ideal_product[R](i, j), j) = forall(x0: R) { ideal_product[R](i, j).contains(x0) implies j.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = bundled_ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](ideal_product[R](i, j), j)
(forall(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ ideal_product[R](i, j) or x0 ∈ j } = true)
function(x0: R) { not (x0 ∈ ideal_product[R](i, j) and not x0 ∈ j) }(x)
